docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEOLI, ERIC ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY MEOLI, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT MCNULTY, MARGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $0.00 SERVED DEC-31-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCNULTY, MARGO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-25-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-25-2025 BYVISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ERIC MEOLI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARGO MCNULTY IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEOLI, ERIC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCNULTY, MARGO A BET IS NOT A CONTRACT BECAUSE THERE IS NO CONSIDERATION. ALSO, MEOLI BELIEVED MCNULTY WAS HAVING A PSYCHOTIC BREAK AT THE TIME OF THE BET, THEREFORE, DEFENDANT WAS UNABLE TO ENTER INTO A VALID CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
